name: Ngwọta Ringer Lactated (LR)
brand_names: Ntụnye Ringer nke a kpụrụ akpụ
description: Mmiri mmiri isotonic crystalloid dabara adaba. Achọtara karịa saline nkịtị maka iweghachi trauma dị ukwuu -- nwere nguzozi n'ụzọ anụ ahụ, obere ihe ize ndụ nke hyperchloremic acidosis. Nwere sodium, potassium, calcium, lactate.
indications: Mweghachi trauma (crystaloid masịrị na ujo hemorrhagic)
dose: Ujo hemorrhagic: Oke na 1L max tupu ị gbanwee na ngwaahịa ọbara. Ebumnuche SBP 80-90 mmHg na-abanye n'ime trauma, 90 mmHg TBI. Ọkụ (Parkland): 4 mL x kg x %TBSA gbara ọkụ karịa 24h (ọkara na 8h mbụ).
contraindications: Ọrịa imeju siri ike (metabolism lactate na-emebi emebi - ikwu)
warnings: Ka dị na crystalloid --enweghị ike ibu oxygen. Ngwaahịa ọbara ka mma maka ujo hemorrhagic. LR bụ naanị akwa mmiri.
Ejikọtala ngwaahịa ọbara n'otu ahịrị (calcium na-akpata clotting).
Akwụghachila oke iweghachite n'ime trauma tupu njikwa ọbara ọgbụgba.

pediatric.dose: 20 ml / kg bolus, nyochaa. Achọtara karịa NS maka trauma ụmụaka.

obstetric.note: Mmiri IV achọrọ na ime na nnyefe. Kwesịrị ekwesị maka ịmaliteghachi ọbara ọgbụgba nwa.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS / ABA Burn Guidelines
